name: mer22_subterminal_repeat_family
description: Architectural archetype: MER22 subterminal repeat family. MER22 (medium reiteration frequency 22) is a ~600 bp dispersed repeat enriched in subtelomeric / subterminal regions of multiple human chromosomes, contributing to the mosaic subtelomeric architecture and to ambiguous mapping near chromosome ends.

architecture.internal_structure: ~600 bp dispersed element; copies show 80-90% identity; enriched in the subterminal 5-50 kb of multiple chromosome ends; shared sub-telomeric blocks across chromosomes drive subtelomeric mismapping.
